Installed.name: Installed
Installed.filter: wprt:PrinterCapabilities/wprt:JobValues/wprt:DocumentProcessing/wprt:MediaSizeName[wprt:AllowedValue ="iso_a3_297x420mm" or wprt:AllowedValue ="iso_sra3_320x450mm" or wprt:AllowedValue ="na_ledger_11x17in" or wprt:AllowedValue ="na_arch-b_12x18in"]

Installed.name: Installed
Installed.filter: wprt:PrinterCapabilities/wprt:JobValues/wprt:JobProcessing/wprt:JobFinishings/wprt:Staple/wprt:Location[wprt:AllowedValue="StapleTopLeft" or wprt:AllowedValue="StapleDualLeft" or wprt:AllowedValue="StapleDualBottom" or wprt:AllowedValue="StapleDualRight"]
